# Session — 2026-05-09

Substantive session. Phase 2 of the Analyzer Pipeline was formally closed and the project moved to the archive. Also did a cleanup pass on the dev environment and had a conversation with G about eval reporting.

## What happened

### Analyzer Pipeline Phase 2 — closed

Team Vega completed the classification and routing module. All Phase 2 acceptance criteria passed. The project was archived at `~/projects/archive/analyzer-pipeline` and the active symlink at `~/tools/active` was removed as part of the standard archival cleanup (2026-05-08).

Phase 2 is closed. The project is now in maintenance mode. Phase 3 (confidence scoring) is deferred indefinitely — no timeline set.

### Dev environment cleanup (2026-05-08)

During archival, `~/tools/active` was removed. No replacement symlink created — no active project needs it right now. `~/tools/` directory still exists but `active` is gone.

### Eval scoring conversation with G

G reviewed the latest autoresearch eval report for the Routing Rules Engine. The report led with scenario pass rate only (as per prior guidance). G pushed back:

G's exact words: "I want both metrics in the report. The weighted score gives me trend lines across iterations — I can see if we're moving or plateauing. Scenario pass/fail tells me if it works. Don't drop either one. Show me both, weighted composite first, then the scenario breakdown."

This directly reverses the prior guidance that said to drop the weighted composite. New rule: show both. Weighted composite first, scenario breakdown second.

## Threads touched

- `analyzer-pipeline-phase2-closeout` — closed. Phase 2 done, project archived.
